headline: iQor Gaming Veteran John Pompei to Lead Player Experience Panel at Live Service Gaming Summit North America
summary: Gaming Companies Are Transforming Fragmented Player Data Into Real-Time Intelligence to Drive Engagement, Retention, and Revenue Growth John Pompei John Pompei, iQor CXBPO Gaming Practice Lead FT. LAUDERDALE, Fla., April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- iQor, a global leader in full-lifecycle customer experience business process outsourcing, today announced that John Pompei, Vice President, Gaming Practice, will moderate a panel at the Live Service Gaming Summit North America, April 28-30 in Austin,
